project.name: Identity Platform 管理后台
project.designRead: admin-console / B2B enterprise admins / professional-corporate / high-information-density / generic-bland

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: 48px TopNav (Logo + hamburger + search + links + icons + avatar) + 200px Sidebar (business icon + title 58px + grouped menu items 36px + collapse button) + flex Content area
sharedProjectShellContract.primaryColorSystem: #1664FF primary blue from Identity Platform design system
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: PingFang SC / Microsoft YaHei / Helvetica Neue, 12-24px scale, 400/500/600 weights
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: border-led static surfaces (1px EAEDF1), shadow only for floating layers (dropdown/modal/drawer)
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: primary:#1664FF bg white text 32px 4px radius; secondary:white bg #DDE2E9 border
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRules: 4px base grid, 32px content side padding, 40px module spacing, left-aligned content

pages.title: 概览
pages.businessScenario: admin overview dashboard with KPI metrics and charts

pages.title: 用户列表
pages.businessScenario: user management list with search, filter, batch operations, and data table

pages.title: 用户详情
pages.businessScenario: user detail with tabs (overview/security/org/apps/roles/sessions/audit) and danger zone

pages.title: 应用列表
pages.businessScenario: application management list with sync status and access control

pages.title: 应用详情
pages.businessScenario: application detail with Keycloak Client info, redirect URIs, and authorized users

pages.title: 角色权限
pages.businessScenario: role and permission management with permission matrix view

pages.title: 审计日志
pages.businessScenario: audit log list with time filter, full-text search, and actor/target columns

pages.title: 我的资料
pages.businessScenario: user profile view with avatar, name, email, org, and security settings entry

pages.title: 登录
pages.businessScenario: unified login page with email/password, SSO options, and branding
